title: Add annual report selection to PDF Report page

requirements.text: In the PDF Report page (RapportPDFPage.tsx), add a report type selector (radio buttons, tabs, or dropdown) that lets the user choose between 'Monthly Report' and 'Annual Report'. The existing monthly report flow must remain fully intact and unchanged.

quotes: La sélection du type de rapport (mensuel vs annuel) doit se faire via un bouton radio / onglet / liste déroulante.
il faut ajouter une sélection annuelle pour avoir un rapport annuel

acceptanceCriteria: A report type selector (radio buttons, tabs, or dropdown) is visible on the PDF Report page.
Selecting 'Monthly Report' shows the existing month selector and monthly report — behavior is unchanged.
Selecting 'Annual Report' hides the month selector and shows a year selector instead.
No existing calculation logic is modified.

requirements.text: When 'Annual Report' is selected, display a year dropdown containing the years 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026. The selected year determines the scope of the annual report.

quotes: On doit pouvoir sélectionner l'année dans une liste d'années (ex. 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, 2026).

acceptanceCriteria: A year dropdown appears when 'Annual Report' mode is active.
Changing the year updates the annual report content accordingly.

requirements.text: The annual report must include the same sections/tables/frames as the monthly report (e.g., appointment listings, revenue summaries, financial tables), but aggregated across all 12 months of the selected year. Compute annual totals by summing each monthly value across January through December of the selected year. Do not alter any existing calculation functions — only add new aggregation logic that calls them per month.

quotes: Le rapport annuel doit regrouper les mêmes cadres/tableaux que le rapport mensuel mais sur les 12 mois de l'année sélectionnée.

acceptanceCriteria: The annual report renders the same structural sections as the monthly report.
Data is aggregated across all 12 months of the selected year.
Annual totals are computed as the sum of values across all 12 months.
No existing calculation functions in monthlyListing.ts, timeRange.ts, or elsewhere are modified.
Row and column widths/heights in all tables remain unchanged.

constraints: Do NOT modify any existing calculation logic anywhere in the codebase.
Do NOT change the design, row heights, column widths, or layout of any existing tables or frames on any page.
Do NOT alter the existing monthly report flow — it must continue to work exactly as before.
Do NOT modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or styling of any existing page.
Adding new data fields or backend schema changes.
Modifying calculations in monthlyListing.ts, timeRange.ts, or any other utility file.
Adding years outside the range 2022–2026 to the year selector.
Changing the Dashboard, ClientDatabasePage, or any other page.
